title: Onboarding - Permission for location tracking - Don't Allow - Enable now - Ask [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify that denying location permission ("Don't Allow") and later tapping "Enable Now" correctly triggers the location permission prompt with appropriate options on iOS.
steps: Start the app for the first time
Choose 'Ask Next Time or When I Share' in Location Services
expected: Proper popup windows are displayed with options such as "Allow Once", "Allow While Using App", "Don't Allow" (or "Only This Time" on Android). The app navigates appropriately to settings and back to the app.
